author: Tib-Gridello
title: Anti-Gaming Check Active Only Between Scan and First Subsequent Operation
notes: All claims verified: resolve_issues (resolution.py:171), remove_ignored_issues (filtering.py:133), and holistic import (merge.py:195 via holistic.py:129) call _recompute_stats without subjective_integrity_target, overwriting state["subjective_integrity"] with {status:"disabled", target_score:None}. This defeats the recovery mechanism in persistence.py:147-158 (_resolve_integrity_target). Penalties applied on deepcopy at line 116 — original subjective_assessments survive unchanged. scan/workflow.py correctly passes target at lines 418/432/442. Real bug: anti-gaming protection (60% of overall_score) effectively erased after first post-scan operation. Original finding — no prior submission covers this integrity target erasure mechanism.
